query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.priority,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS send_ready_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0 THEN 1 END) AS all_unverified,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0 
    AND (c.enrichmentSource = 'apollo' OR c.linkedin IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 END) AS apollo_linkedin_unverified,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0 
    AND (c.enrichmentSource = 'apollo' OR c.linkedin IS NOT NULL)
    AND (c.enrichmentStatus IS NULL OR (c.enrichmentStatus NOT IN ('enriched', 'not_found') AND c.enrichedAt IS NULL) OR c.enrichedAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY))
    THEN 1 END) AS eligible_after_filter
FROM projects p
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.priority
HAVING send_ready_count BETWEEN 1 AND 2
ORDER BY apollo_linkedin_unverified DESC
LIMIT 10;

  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.priority,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS send_ready_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0 THEN 1 END) AS all_unverified,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0 
    AND (c.enrichmentSource = 'apollo' OR c.linkedin IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 END) AS apollo_linkedin_unverified,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0 
    AND (c.enrichmentSource = 'apollo' OR c.linkedin IS NOT NULL)
    AND (c.enrichmentStatus IS NULL OR (c.enrichmentStatus NOT IN ('enriched', 'not_found') AND c.enrichedAt IS NULL) OR c.enrichedAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY))
    THEN 1 END) AS eligible_after_filter
FROM projects p
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.priority
HAVING send_ready_count BETWEEN 1 AND 2
ORDER BY apollo_linkedin_unverified DESC
LIMIT 10;
